Rev 14:9-11.kjv_text:
And the third angel followed them, saying with a loud voice, If any man worship the beast and his image, and receive [his] mark in his forehead, or in his hand,
The same shall drink of the wine of the wrath of God, which is poured out without mixture into the cup of his indignation; and he shall be tormented with fire and brimstone in the presence of the holy angels, and in the presence of the Lamb:
And the smoke of their torment ascendeth up for ever and ever: and they have no rest day nor night, who worship the beast and his image, and whosoever receiveth the mark of his name.

Rev 14:13.kjv_text: And I heard a voice from heaven saying unto me, Write, Blessed [are] the dead which die in the Lord from henceforth: Yea, saith the Spirit, that they may rest from their labours; and their works do follow them.

Rev 16:19.kjv_text: And the great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell: and great Babylon came in remembrance before God, to give unto her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of his wrath.

Rev 19:15.kjv_text: And out of his mouth goeth a sharp sword, that with it he should smite the nations: and he shall rule them with a rod of iron: and he treadeth the winepress of the fierceness and wrath of Almighty God.

Rev 4:8.kjv_text: And the four beasts had each of them six wings about [him]; and [they were] full of eyes within: and they rest not day and night, saying, Holy, holy, holy, Lord God Almighty, which was, and is, and is to come.

Psa 75:8.kjv_text: For in the hand of the LORD [there is] a cup, and the wine is red; it is full of mixture; and he poureth out of the same: but the dregs thereof, all the wicked of the earth shall wring [them] out, [and] drink [them].

Isa 51:17,22.kjv_text:
Awake, awake, stand up, O Jerusalem, which hast drunk at the hand of the LORD the cup of his fury; thou hast drunken the dregs of the cup of trembling, [and] wrung [them] out.
Thus saith thy Lord the LORD, and thy God [that] pleadeth the cause of his people, Behold, I have taken out of thine hand the cup of trembling, [even] the dregs of the cup of my fury; thou shalt no more drink it again:

Jer 25:15-28.kjv_text:
For thus saith the LORD God of Israel unto me; Take the wine cup of this fury at my hand, and cause all the nations, to whom I send thee, to drink it.
And they shall drink, and be moved, and be mad, because of the sword that I will send among them.
Then took I the cup at the LORD'S hand, and made all the nations to drink, unto whom the LORD had sent me:
Therefore thou shalt say unto them, Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Drink ye, and be drunken, and spue, and fall, and rise no more, because of the sword which I will send among you.
And it shall be, if they refuse to take the cup at thine hand to drink, then shalt thou say unto them, Thus saith the LORD of hosts; Ye shall certainly drink.

Jer 51:7.kjv_text: Babylon [hath been] a golden cup in the LORD'S hand, that made all the earth drunken: the nations have drunken of her wine; therefore the nations are mad.

Eze 23:31-34.kjv_text:
Thou hast walked in the way of thy sister; therefore will I give her cup into thine hand.
Thus saith the Lord GOD; Thou shalt drink of thy sister's cup deep and large: thou shalt be laughed to scorn and had in derision; it containeth much.
Thou shalt be filled with drunkenness and sorrow, with the cup of astonishment and desolation, with the cup of thy sister Samaria.
Thou shalt even drink it and suck [it] out, and thou shalt break the sherds thereof, and pluck off thine own breasts: for I have spoken [it], saith the Lord GOD.

Isa 34:9-10.kjv_text:
And the streams thereof shall be turned into pitch, and the dust thereof into brimstone, and the land thereof shall become burning pitch.
It shall not be quenched night nor day; the smoke thereof shall go up for ever: from generation to generation it shall lie waste; none shall pass through it for ever and ever.

Isa 34:11-17.kjv_text:
But the cormorant and the bittern shall possess it; the owl also and the raven shall dwell in it: and he shall stretch out upon it the line of confusion, and the stones of emptiness.
They shall call the nobles thereof to the kingdom, but none [shall be] there, and all her princes shall be nothing.
And thorns shall come up in her palaces, nettles and brambles in the fortresses thereof: and it shall be an habitation of dragons, [and] a court for owls.
The wild beasts of the desert shall also meet with the wild beasts of the island, and the satyr shall cry to his fellow; the screech owl also shall rest there, and find for herself a place of rest.
There shall the great owl make her nest, and lay, and hatch, and gather under her shadow: there shall the vultures also be gathered, every one with her mate.
Seek ye out of the book of the LORD, and read: no one of these shall fail, none shall want her mate: for my mouth it hath commanded, and his spirit it hath gathered them.
And he hath cast the lot for them, and his hand hath divided it unto them by line: they shall possess it for ever, from generation to generation shall they dwell therein.

Gen 19:24-28.kjv_text:
Then the LORD rained upon Sodom and upon Gomorrah brimstone and fire from the LORD out of heaven;
And he overthrew those cities, and all the plain, and all the inhabitants of the cities, and that which grew upon the ground.
But his wife looked back from behind him, and she became a pillar of salt.
And Abraham gat up early in the morning to the place where he stood before the LORD:
And he looked toward Sodom and Gomorrah, and toward all the land of the plain, and beheld, and, lo, the smoke of the country went up as the smoke of a furnace.

Rev 19:3.kjv_text: And again they said, Alleluia. And her smoke rose up for ever and ever.

Mal 4:1-3.kjv_text:
For, behold, the day cometh, that shall burn as an oven; and all the proud, yea, and all that do wickedly, shall be stubble: and the day that cometh shall burn them up, saith the LORD of hosts, that it shall leave them neither root nor branch.
But unto you that fear my name shall the Sun of righteousness arise with healing in his wings; and ye shall go forth, and grow up as calves of the stall.
And ye shall tread down the wicked; for they shall be ashes under the soles of your feet in the day that I shall do [this], saith the LORD of hosts.

Jude 1:7.kjv_text: Even as Sodom and Gomorrha, and the cities about them in like manner, giving themselves over to fornication, and going after strange flesh, are set forth for an example, suffering the vengeance of eternal fire.

2Pe 2:6.kjv_text: And turning the cities of Sodom and Gomorrha into ashes condemned [them] with an overthrow, making [them] an ensample unto those that after should live ungodly;

Rev 20:9-10.kjv_text:
And they went up on the breadth of the earth, and compassed the camp of the saints about, and the beloved city: and fire came down from God out of heaven, and devoured them.
And the devil that deceived them was cast into the lake of fire and brimstone, where the beast and the false prophet [are], and shall be tormented day and night for ever and ever.

Rev 20:14-15.kjv_text:
And death and hell were cast into the lake of fire. This is the second death.
And whosoever was not found written in the book of life was cast into the lake of fire.

Rev 15:1,7-8.kjv_text:
And I saw another sign in heaven, great and marvellous, seven angels having the seven last plagues; for in them is filled up the wrath of God.
And one of the four beasts gave unto the seven angels seven golden vials full of the wrath of God, who liveth for ever and ever.
And the temple was filled with smoke from the glory of God, and from his power; and no man was able to enter into the temple, till the seven plagues of the seven angels were fulfilled.

Joh 3:16.kjv_text: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have everlasting life.

Rom 6:23.kjv_text: For the wages of sin [is] death; but the gift of God [is] eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord.

Mat 10:28.kjv_text: And fear not them which kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul: but rather fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in hell.

1Co 15:24-28.kjv_text:
Then [cometh] the end, when he shall have delivered up the kingdom to God, even the Father; when he shall have put down all rule and all authority and power.
For he must reign, till he hath put all enemies under his feet.
The last enemy [that] shall be destroyed [is] death.
For he hath put all things under his feet. But when he saith, all things are put under [him, it is] manifest that he is excepted, which did put all things under him.
And when all things shall be subdued unto him, then shall the Son also himself be subject unto him that put all things under him, that God may be all in all.

Rev 21:4-5.kjv_text:
And God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes; and there shall be no more death, neither sorrow, nor crying, neither shall there be any more pain: for the former things are passed away.
And he that sat upon the throne said, Behold, I make all things new. And he said unto me, Write: for these words are true and faithful.

Nah 1:9.kjv_text: What do ye imagine against the LORD? he will make an utter end: affliction shall not rise up the second time.

1Ti 6:16.kjv_text: Who only hath immortality, dwelling in the light which no man can approach unto; whom no man hath seen, nor can see: to whom [be] honour and power everlasting. Amen.

Eze 28:18-19.kjv_text:
Thou hast defiled thy sanctuaries by the multitude of thine iniquities, by the iniquity of thy traffick; therefore will I bring forth a fire from the midst of thee, it shall devour thee, and I will bring thee to ashes upon the earth in the sight of all them that behold thee.
All they that know thee among the people shall be astonished at thee: thou shalt be a terror, and never [shalt] thou [be] any more.

Mat 25:41,46.kjv_text:
Then shall he say also unto them on the left hand, Depart from me, ye cursed, into everlasting fire, prepared for the devil and his angels:
And these shall go away into everlasting punishment: but the righteous into life eternal.

Mar 9:43-48.kjv_text:
And if thy hand offend thee, cut it off: it is better for thee to enter into life maimed, than having two hands to go into hell, into the fire that never shall be quenched:
Where their worm dieth not, and the fire is not quenched.
And if thy foot offend thee, cut it off: it is better for thee to enter halt into life, than having two feet to be cast into hell, into the fire that never shall be quenched:
Where their worm dieth not, and the fire is not quenched.
And if thine eye offend thee, pluck it out: it is better for thee to enter into the kingdom of God with one eye, than having two eyes to be cast into hell fire:
Where their worm dieth not, and the fire is not quenched.

Isa 66:24.kjv_text: And they shall go forth, and look upon the carcases of the men that have transgressed against me: for their worm shall not die, neither shall their fire be quenched; and they shall be an abhorring unto all flesh.

Rev 8:3-4.kjv_text:
And another angel came and stood at the altar, having a golden censer; and there was given unto him much incense, that he should offer [it] with the prayers of all saints upon the golden altar which was before the throne.
And the smoke of the incense, [which came] with the prayers of the saints, ascended up before God out of the angel's hand.

Psa 11:6.kjv_text: Upon the wicked he shall rain snares, fire and brimstone, and an horrible tempest: [this shall be] the portion of their cup.

Rev 9:5.kjv_text: And to them it was given that they should not kill them, but that they should be tormented five months: and their torment [was] as the torment of a scorpion, when he striketh a man.

Rev 18:7,10,15.kjv_text:
How much she hath glorified herself, and lived deliciously, so much torment and sorrow give her: for she saith in her heart, I sit a queen, and am no widow, and shall see no sorrow.
Standing afar off for the fear of her torment, saying, Alas, alas, that great city Babylon, that mighty city! for in one hour is thy judgment come.
The merchants of these things, which were made rich by her, shall stand afar off for the fear of her torment, weeping and wailing,

Rev 6:16-17.kjv_text:
And said to the mountains and rocks, Fall on us, and hide us from the face of him that sitteth on the throne, and from the wrath of the Lamb:
For the great day of his wrath is come; and who shall be able to stand?

Rev 17:8,11.kjv_text:
The beast that thou sawest was, and is not; and shall ascend out of the bottomless pit, and go into perdition: and they that dwell on the earth shall wonder, whose names were not written in the book of life from the foundation of the world, when they behold the beast that was, and is not, and yet is.
And the beast that was, and is not, even he is the eighth, and is of the seven, and goeth into perdition.

Phi 3:19.kjv_text: Whose end [is] destruction, whose God [is their] belly, and [whose] glory [is] in their shame, who mind earthly things.)

Deu 4:24.kjv_text: For the LORD thy God [is] a consuming fire, [even] a jealous God.

Heb 12:29.kjv_text: For our God [is] a consuming fire.

Rev 21:8.kjv_text: But the fearful, and unbelieving, and the abominable, and murderers, and whoremongers, and sorcerers, and idolaters, and all liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death.

Mat 3:12.kjv_text: Whose fan [is] in his hand, and he will throughly purge his floor, and gather his wheat into the garner; but he will burn up the chaff with unquenchable fire.

Psa 37:10,20.kjv_text:
For yet a little while, and the wicked [shall] not [be]: yea, thou shalt diligently consider his place, and it [shall] not [be].
But the wicked shall perish, and the enemies of the LORD [shall be] as the fat of lambs: they shall consume; into smoke shall they consume away.

Oba 1:16.kjv_text: For as ye have drunk upon my holy mountain, [so] shall all the heathen drink continually, yea, they shall drink, and they shall swallow down, and they shall be as though they had not been.

Isa 47:14.kjv_text: Behold, they shall be as stubble; the fire shall burn them; they shall not deliver themselves from the power of the flame: [there shall] not [be] a coal to warm at, [nor] fire to sit before it.

Dan 12:1.kjv_text: And at that time shall Michael stand up, the great prince which standeth for the children of thy people: and there shall be a time of trouble, such as never was since there was a nation [even] to that same time: and at that time thy people shall be delivered, every one that shall be found written in the book.

Rev 14:8.kjv_text: And there followed another angel, saying, Babylon is fallen, is fallen, that great city, because she made all nations drink of the wine of the wrath of her fornication.

Rev 15:8.kjv_text: And the temple was filled with smoke from the glory of God, and from his power; and no man was able to enter into the temple, till the seven plagues of the seven angels were fulfilled.

Heb 9:12.kjv_text: Neither by the blood of goats and calves, but by his own blood he entered in once into the holy place, having obtained eternal redemption [for us].

Heb 5:9.kjv_text: And being made perfect, he became the author of eternal salvation unto all them that obey him;

Heb 6:2.kjv_text: Of the doctrine of baptisms, and of laying on of hands, and of resurrection of the dead, and of eternal judgment.

Isa 30:33.kjv_text: For Tophet [is] ordained of old; yea, for the king it is prepared; he hath made [it] deep [and] large: the pile thereof [is] fire and much wood; the breath of the LORD, like a stream of brimstone, doth kindle it.

Deu 29:23.kjv_text: [And that] the whole land thereof [is] brimstone, and salt, [and] burning, [that] it is not sown, nor beareth, nor any grass groweth therein, like the overthrow of Sodom, and Gomorrah, Admah, and Zeboim, which the LORD overthrew in his anger, and in his wrath:

Luk 17:29.kjv_text: But the same day that Lot went out of Sodom it rained fire and brimstone from heaven, and destroyed [them] all.

Isa 13:19.kjv_text: And Babylon, the glory of kingdoms, the beauty of the Chaldees' excellency, shall be as when God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah.

Zep 2:9.kjv_text: Therefore [as] I live, saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, Surely Moab shall be as Sodom, and the children of Ammon as Gomorrah, [even] the breeding of nettles, and saltpits, and a perpetual desolation: the residue of my people shall spoil them, and the remnant of my people shall possess them.

Exo 15:7.kjv_text: And in the greatness of thine excellency thou hast overthrown them that rose up against thee: thou sentest forth thy wrath, [which] consumed them as stubble.

Job 21:18.kjv_text: They are as stubble before the wind, and as chaff that the storm carrieth away.

Luk 16:23-28.kjv_text:
And in hell he lift up his eyes, being in torments, and seeth Abraham afar off, and Lazarus in his bosom.
And he cried and said, Father Abraham, have mercy on me, and send Lazarus, that he may dip the tip of his finger in water, and cool my tongue; for I am tormented in this flame.
But Abraham said, Son, remember that thou in thy lifetime receivedst thy good things, and likewise Lazarus evil things: but now he is comforted, and thou art tormented.
And beside all this, between us and you there is a great gulf fixed: so that they which would pass from hence to you cannot; neither can they pass to us, that [would come] from thence.
Then he said, I pray thee therefore, father, that thou wouldest send him to my father's house:
For I have five brethren; that he may testify unto them, lest they also come into this place of torment.

Heb 4:1-11.kjv_text:
There remaineth therefore a rest to the people of God.
For he that is entered into his rest, he also hath ceased from his own works, as God [did] from his.
Let us labour therefore to enter into that rest, lest any man fall after the same example of unbelief.

2Pe 2:12.kjv_text: But these, as natural brute beasts, made to be taken and destroyed, speak evil of the things that they understand not; and shall utterly perish in their own corruption;

Psa 68:2.kjv_text: As smoke is driven away, [so] drive [them] away: as wax melteth before the fire, [so] let the wicked perish at the presence of God.

Isa 1:10.kjv_text: Hear the word of the LORD, ye rulers of Sodom; give ear unto the law of our God, ye people of Gomorrah.

Amo 4:11.kjv_text: I have overthrown [some] of you, as God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah, and ye were as a firebrand plucked out of the burning: yet have ye not returned unto me, saith the LORD.

Isa 34:14-17.kjv_text:
The wild beasts of the desert shall also meet with the wild beasts of the island, and the satyr shall cry to his fellow; the screech owl also shall rest there, and find for herself a place of rest.
There shall the great owl make her nest, and lay, and hatch, and gather under her shadow: there shall the vultures also be gathered, every one with her mate.
Seek ye out of the book of the LORD, and read: no one of these shall fail, none shall want her mate: for my mouth it hath commanded, and his spirit it hath gathered them.
And he hath cast the lot for them, and his hand hath divided it unto them by line: they shall possess it for ever, from generation to generation shall they dwell therein.

Isa 34:9-11.kjv_text:
And the streams thereof shall be turned into pitch, and the dust thereof into brimstone, and the land thereof shall become burning pitch.
It shall not be quenched night nor day; the smoke thereof shall go up for ever: from generation to generation it shall lie waste; none shall pass through it for ever and ever.
But the cormorant and the bittern shall possess it; the owl also and the raven shall dwell in it: and he shall stretch out upon it the line of confusion, and the stones of emptiness.

Jer 25:15-17,27-28.kjv_text:
For thus saith the LORD God of Israel unto me; Take the wine cup of this fury at my hand, and cause all the nations, to whom I send thee, to drink it.
And they shall drink, and be moved, and be mad, because of the sword that I will send among them.
Then took I the cup at the LORD'S hand, and made all the nations to drink, unto whom the LORD had sent me:
Therefore thou shalt say unto them, Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Drink ye, and be drunken, and spue, and fall, and rise no more, because of the sword which I will send among you.
And it shall be, if they refuse to take the cup at thine hand to drink, then shalt thou say unto them, Thus saith the LORD of hosts; Ye shall certainly drink.

Jud 1:7.kjv_text: Even as Sodom and Gomorrha, and the cities about them in like manner, giving themselves over to fornication, and going after strange flesh, are set forth for an example, suffering the vengeance of eternal fire.

Rev 14:12-13.kjv_text:
Here is the patience of the saints: here [are] they that keep the commandments of God, and the faith of Jesus.
And I heard a voice from heaven saying unto me, Write, Blessed [are] the dead which die in the Lord from henceforth: Yea, saith the Spirit, that they may rest from their labours; and their works do follow them.

Rev 14:8-11.kjv_text:
And there followed another angel, saying, Babylon is fallen, is fallen, that great city, because she made all nations drink of the wine of the wrath of her fornication.
And the third angel followed them, saying with a loud voice, If any man worship the beast and his image, and receive [his] mark in his forehead, or in his hand,
The same shall drink of the wine of the wrath of God, which is poured out without mixture into the cup of his indignation; and he shall be tormented with fire and brimstone in the presence of the holy angels, and in the presence of the Lamb:
And the smoke of their torment ascendeth up for ever and ever: and they have no rest day nor night, who worship the beast and his image, and whosoever receiveth the mark of his name.

χάραγμα              χάραγμα         G5480    [N-ASN] Acc Sg N         
τοῦ                  ὁ               G3588    [T-GSN] Gen Sg N         
ὀνόματος             ὄνομα           G3686    [N-GSN] Gen Sg N         
αὐτοῦ.               αὐτός           G846     [P-GSN] Gen Sg N         
----------------------------------------------------------------------
parsing.Rev 4:8:
======================================================================
  Revelation 4:8 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: καὶ τὰ τέσσερα ζῷα, ἓν καθ' ἓν αὐτῶν ἔχων ἀνὰ πτέρυγας ἕξ, κυκλόθεν καὶ ἔσωθεν γέμουσιν ὀφθαλμῶν· καὶ ἀνάπαυσιν οὐκ ἔχουσιν ἡμέρας καὶ νυκτὸς λέγοντες Ἅγιος ἅγιος ἅγιος Κύριος ὁ Θεός ὁ Παντοκράτωρ, ὁ ἦν καὶ ὁ ὢν καὶ ὁ ἐρχόμενος.

KEY: ἀνάπαυσιν (G372) οὐκ ἔχουσιν (G2192 V-PAI-3P) ἡμέρας (G2250 N-GSF) καὶ νυκτὸς (G3571 N-GSF)
Identical construction to Rev 14:11.
parsing.Rev 16:19:
======================================================================
  Revelation 16:19 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: καὶ Βαβυλὼν ἡ μεγάλη ἐμνήσθη ἐνώπιον τοῦ Θεοῦ δοῦναι αὐτῇ τὸ ποτήριον τοῦ οἴνου τοῦ θυμοῦ τῆς ὀργῆς αὐτοῦ.

KEY: ποτήριον (G4221) τοῦ οἴνου (G3631) τοῦ θυμοῦ (G2372) τῆς ὀργῆς (G3709) — four-genitive chain.
parsing.Rev 19:15:
======================================================================
  Revelation 19:15 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: καὶ αὐτὸς πατεῖ τὴν ληνὸν τοῦ οἴνου τοῦ θυμοῦ τῆς ὀργῆς τοῦ Θεοῦ τοῦ Παντοκράτορος.

KEY: ληνὸν (G3025) τοῦ οἴνου (G3631) τοῦ θυμοῦ (G2372) τῆς ὀργῆς (G3709) τοῦ Θεοῦ (G2316) τοῦ Παντοκράτορος (G3841) — five-genitive chain.
parsing.Rev 20:9:
======================================================================
  Revelation 20:9 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: καὶ κατέβη πῦρ ἐκ τοῦ οὐρανοῦ καὶ κατέφαγεν αὐτούς·

KEY: κατέφαγεν (G2719 katesthio V-2AAI-3S Aor Act Ind) = DEVOURED — applied to human followers. Consuming fire that finishes its work.
parsing.Rev 20:10:
======================================================================
  Revelation 20:10 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: καὶ ὁ διάβολος ὁ πλανῶν αὐτοὺς ἐβλήθη εἰς τὴν λίμνην τοῦ πυρὸς καὶ θείου, ὅπου καὶ τὸ θηρίον καὶ ὁ ψευδοπροφήτης, καὶ βασανισθήσονται ἡμέρας καὶ νυκτὸς εἰς τοὺς αἰῶνας τῶν αἰώνων.

KEY: βασανισθήσονται (G928 V-FPI-3P Fut Pass Ind Pl) = shall be tormented — applied to devil, beast, false prophet (non-human/symbolic). Different verb from Rev 20:9.
parsing.Rev 20:14:
======================================================================
  Revelation 20:14 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: καὶ ὁ θάνατος καὶ ὁ Ἅιδης ἐβλήθησαν εἰς τὴν λίμνην τοῦ πυρός. οὗτος ὁ θάνατος ὁ δεύτερός ἐστιν, ἡ λίμνη τοῦ πυρός.

KEY: Lake of fire explicitly defined as 'the second DEATH' (θάνατος G2288). Death vocabulary for human fate.
parsing.Rev 20:15:
======================================================================
  Revelation 20:15 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: καὶ εἴ τις οὐχ εὑρέθη ἐν τῇ βίβλῳ τῆς ζωῆς γεγραμμένος, ἐβλήθη εἰς τὴν λίμνην τοῦ πυρός.

KEY: Human wicked cast into lake of fire — described with ἐβλήθη (aorist passive of βάλλω). No torment vocabulary applied to human wicked.
parsing.Jud 1:7:
======================================================================
  Jude 1:7 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: ὡς Σόδομα καὶ Γόμορρα καὶ αἱ περὶ αὐτὰς πόλεις, τὸν ὅμοιον τρόπον τούτοις ἐκπορνεύσασαι καὶ ἀπελθοῦσαι ὀπίσω σαρκὸς ἑτέρας, πρόκεινται δεῖγμα πυρὸς αἰωνίου δίκην ὑπέχουσαι.

KEY: πυρὸς αἰωνίου (G4442+G166 fire eternal Gen Sg) δίκην (G1349 vengeance/justice Acc Sg) ὑπέχουσαι (G5254 suffering/undergoing Pres Act Ptcp Nom Pl F). Sodom 'suffers' (present ptcp = ongoing example status) the 'vengeance of eternal fire.' Yet the cities are ashes (2 Pet 2:6).
parsing.2Pe 2:6:
======================================================================
  2 Peter 2:6 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: καὶ πόλεις Σοδόμων καὶ Γομόρρας τεφρώσας καταστροφῇ κατέκρινεν, ὑπόδειγμα μελλόντων ἀσεβεῖν τεθεικώς,

KEY: τεφρώσας (G5077 tephroō V-AAP-NSM Aor Act Ptcp) = having turned to ashes — completed action. ὑπόδειγμα (G5262) = example/pattern for the ungodly.
parsing.1Co 15:26:
======================================================================
  1 Corinthians 15:26 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: ἔσχατος ἐχθρὸς καταργεῖται ὁ θάνατος·

KEY: καταργεῖται (G2673 katargeo V-PPI-3S Pres Pass Ind) = is being destroyed/abolished. Death is the LAST enemy abolished.
parsing.Jude 1:7:
======================================================================
  Jude 1:7 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: ὡς Σόδομα καὶ Γόμορρα καὶ αἱ περὶ αὐτὰς πόλεις, τὸν ὅμοιον τρόπον τούτοις ἐκπορνεύσασαι καὶ ἀπελθοῦσαι ὀπίσω σαρκὸς ἑτέρας, πρόκεινται δεῖγμα πυρὸς αἰωνίου δίκην ὑπέχουσαι.

KEY: πυρὸς αἰωνίου (G4442+G166 fire eternal Gen Sg) δίκην (G1349 vengeance/justice Acc Sg) ὑπέχουσαι (G5254 suffering/undergoing Pres Act Ptcp Nom Pl F). Sodom 'suffers' (present ptcp = ongoing example status) the 'vengeance of eternal fire.' Yet the cities are ashes (2 Pet 2:6).
parsing.2 Pet 2:6:
======================================================================
  2 Peter 2:6 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: καὶ πόλεις Σοδόμων καὶ Γομόρρας τεφρώσας καταστροφῇ κατέκρινεν, ὑπόδειγμα μελλόντων ἀσεβεῖν τεθεικώς,

KEY: τεφρώσας (G5077 tephroō V-AAP-NSM Aor Act Ptcp) = having turned to ashes — completed action. ὑπόδειγμα (G5262) = example/pattern for the ungodly.
parsing.1 Cor 15:24-28:
======================================================================
  1 Corinthians 15:26 - GRAMMATICAL ANALYSIS
======================================================================

Greek Text: ἔσχατος ἐχθρὸς καταργεῖται ὁ θάνατος·

KEY: καταργεῖται (G2673 katargeo V-PPI-3S Pres Pass Ind) = is being destroyed/abolished. Death is the LAST enemy abolished.

[1 Cor 15:24-28 passage. Key verse 15:26 parsed. katargeitai (G2673) = is being abolished. Death is the LAST enemy destroyed.]
parsing.Isa 34:10:
======================================================================
  Isaiah 34:10
======================================================================

  לַ֤יְלָה וְיֹומָם֙ לֹ֣א תִכְבֶּ֔ה לְעֹולָ֖ם יַעֲלֶ֣ה עֲשָׁנָ֑הּ מִדֹּ֤ור לָדֹור֙ תֶּחֱרָ֔ב לְנֵ֣צַח נְצָחִ֔ים אֵ֥ין עֹבֵ֖ר בָּֽהּ׃

  KEY: לְעֹולָ֖ם (le-olam H5769 forever) יַעֲלֶ֣ה (yaaleh ascend) עֲשָׁנָ֑הּ (ashanah smoke+3fs)
  לְנֵ֣צַח נְצָחִ֔ים (le-netsach netsachim H5331 perpetuity of perpetuities — strongest Hebrew forever form)
  Yet animals dwell there (34:11-17). Fire ended. 'Forever' = permanent RESULT of completed destruction.
parsing.Mal 4:1:
======================================================================
  Malachi 3:19 (= English 4:1)
======================================================================

  כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֤ה הַיֹּום֙ בָּ֔א בֹּעֵ֖ר כַּתַּנּ֑וּר וְהָי֨וּ כָל־זֵדִ֜ים וְכָל־עֹשֵׂ֤ה רִשְׁעָה֙ קַ֔שׁ
  וְלִהַ֨ט אֹתָ֜ם הַיֹּ֣ום הַבָּ֗א... אֲשֶׁ֛ר לֹא־יַעֲזֹ֥ב לָהֶ֖ם שֹׁ֥רֶשׁ וְעָנָֽף׃

  KEY: תַּנּ֑וּר (tannuwr H8574 oven/furnace), קַ֔שׁ (qash H7179 stubble),
  שֹׁ֥רֶשׁ (sheresh H8328 root), וְעָנָֽף (anaph H6057 branch)
  'Neither root nor branch' = total elimination. The wicked ARE stubble consumed by the oven-fire.
parsing.Mal 4:3:
======================================================================
  Malachi 3:21 (= English 4:3)
======================================================================

  וְעַסֹּותֶ֣ם רְשָׁעִ֔ים כִּֽי־יִהְי֣וּ אֵ֔פֶר תַּ֖חַת כַּפֹּ֣ות רַגְלֵיכֶ֑ם

  KEY: אֵ֔פֶר (epher H665 ashes/dust), תַּ֖חַת כַּפֹּ֣ות רַגְלֵיכֶ֑ם (under soles of your feet)
  The wicked BECOME ashes trodden by the righteous. Not tormented — ASHES.
parsing.Psa 75:8:
======================================================================
  Psalms 75:9 (= English 75:8)
======================================================================

  כִּ֤י כֹ֪וס בְּֽיַד־יְהוָ֡ה וְיַ֤יִן חָמַ֨ר׀ מָ֥לֵא מֶסֶךְ֮

  KEY: כֹ֪וס (kowc H3563 cup), יַ֤יִן (yayin H3196 wine), מָ֥לֵא (male full),
  מֶסֶךְ֮ (mesek H4469 mixture). Cup of wine FULL OF MIXTURE.
  Rev 14:10 reverses this: kekerasmenou akratou = mixed UNMIXED.
parsing.Isa 34:9-10:
======================================================================
  Isaiah 34:10
======================================================================

  לַ֤יְלָה וְיֹומָם֙ לֹ֣א תִכְבֶּ֔ה לְעֹולָ֖ם יַעֲלֶ֣ה עֲשָׁנָ֑הּ מִדֹּ֤ור לָדֹור֙ תֶּחֱרָ֔ב לְנֵ֣צַח נְצָחִ֔ים אֵ֥ין עֹבֵ֖ר בָּֽהּ׃

  KEY: לְעֹולָ֖ם (le-olam H5769 forever) יַעֲלֶ֣ה (yaaleh ascend) עֲשָׁנָ֑הּ (ashanah smoke+3fs)
  לְנֵ֣צַח נְצָחִ֔ים (le-netsach netsachim H5331 perpetuity of perpetuities — strongest Hebrew forever form)
  Yet animals dwell there (34:11-17). Fire ended. 'Forever' = permanent RESULT of completed destruction.

focus_areas.title: Thumos and orge: the double-wrath vocabulary of Rev 14:10
Akratos (G194): the unmixed-wine hapax and its OT reversal of Psalm 75:8
The smoke-ascending-forever formula: Isa 34:10 → Rev 14:11 → Rev 19:3
'No rest day nor night' — Rev 14:11 vs. Rev 4:8 identical construction
Basanizo/basanismos: touchstone testing or ongoing conscious torment?
The Sodom-Edom paradigm: 'eternal fire' produces ashes
'In the presence of the holy angels and in the presence of the Lamb' — judicial witness or spectated suffering?
Subject differentiation at the lake of fire: humans vs. symbolic entities
The didactic vs. apocalyptic genre distribution of destruction/torment vocabulary
The cup-of-wrath trajectory: Psalm 75 → Isaiah 51 → Jeremiah 25/51 → Revelation 14/16/19
The clean-universe argument: eternal torment vs. 'God all in all'
